overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with an illuminated umbrella walking through a rainy neon-lit dystopian city at night. The character descends from a street with massive holographic billboards into an underpass system with moving traffic, then navigates through industrial zones with dynamic neon lighting and security barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street with holographic advertisements

events.description: character approaches concrete stairs leading downward

agents.ego_description: character with illuminated orange umbrella walking through rainy neon-lit street with holographic billboards visible ahead

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisement displaying 'TRUST' text with portrait
massive curved holographic display with 'NO FUTURE' text in pink neon
tall building covered in neon signage and illuminated windows
rain-slicked street surface reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rainy cyberpunk street at night, dominated by massive holographic billboards advertising 'TRUST' and 'NO FUTURE' against a dark sky. The character walks forward with an illuminated umbrella, approaching a concrete stairwell that descends into the undercity.

events.description: character enters enclosed concrete stairwell from open street
lighting shifts from bright neon to dim artificial tunnel lighting

agents.ego_description: character walking down concrete stairs into the underpass system

entered.detail: wet concrete steps descending into darkness with metal edges
metal handrail along the left side of the stairwell
black and yellow diagonal hazard stripes on tunnel walls

segments.scene_description: The character descends a narrow concrete stairwell, leaving the neon-lit street behind for a dimly lit tunnel. Yellow and black warning stripes mark the walls as the character moves deeper into the underpass system, protected from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered underpass with vehicle traffic lanes

events.description: character exits tunnel into covered underpass with visible traffic
futuristic vehicles pass by on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: character walking along underpass sidewalk with futuristic traffic passing on the right

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving through underpass with headlights on

entered.detail: concrete ceiling with exposed beams and fluorescent lighting
yellow and black striped concrete barriers separating pedestrian and vehicle zones
linear fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the underpass

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairwell, the character enters a covered underpass where futuristic vehicles drive past on the right. The space is illuminated by harsh overhead fluorescent lights, with striped barriers separating the pedestrian walkway from the traffic lanes.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved pedestrian walkway with dynamic neon wall

events.description: curved wall with shifting colored neon panels becomes visible on the left
character passes a child walking with an adult holding a purple umbrella

agents.ego_description: character walking past curved wall with shifting pink, blue, and green neon lights, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: child in white shirt and red backpack walking alongside adult with purple umbrella

entered.detail: large curved concrete wall with dynamic LED panels cycling through pink, blue, green, and orange colors
tall green lamppost with bright white light and digital signage

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a curved pedestrian path where a massive wall displays shifting neon colors—cycling through magenta, cyan, green, and amber. Other pedestrians appear, including a child with a backpack, as the environment transitions from the traffic underpass to a more commercial walkway.

events.description: character exits covered walkway into open intersection with visible sky
character crosses the wet street at the intersection, navigating around vehicles

agents.ego_description: character crossing wet asphalt intersection with heavy rain falling, moving between traffic lanes

entered.detail: wide urban intersection with multiple lanes and crosswalk markings
massive concrete highway overpass with support columns
tall traffic signal pole with digital displays

segments.scene_description: Leaving the covered walkway, the character enters a wide open intersection beneath a massive concrete overpass. Heavy rain continues to fall on the wet asphalt as the character crosses the street, with holographic billboards visible on distant buildings and traffic moving through the intersection.

events.description: character enters industrial zone with yellow structural elements and security signage
character passes through security checkpoint with 'KEEP OUT' warnings

agents.ego_description: character walking through industrial security entrance with yellow painted structures and holographic warning signs

notable_agents.action: person with illuminated umbrella standing near security barriers

entered.detail: massive concrete support pillars painted bright yellow with industrial lighting
large metal security barrier with diagonal support beams
illuminated red warning sign with 'KEEP OUT' text and prohibition symbols

segments.scene_description: The character enters a restricted industrial area marked by bright yellow structural pillars and security barriers. A prominent 'KEEP OUT' sign warns of the restricted zone as the character passes through the checkpoint, moving deeper into the industrial undercity with holographic advertisements visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked neon street down into a subterranean transit system and finally into a restricted industrial zone. It begins beneath massive holographic billboards advertising trust and hopelessness, following a character with an illuminated umbrella as they descend a concrete stairwell marked with yellow and black warning stripes. As the character emerges from the stairs, the scene shifts into a covered underpass where harsh fluorescent lights illuminate passing futuristic vehicles and a curved wall cycling through magenta, cyan, and amber neon hues. The environment then opens up into a wide intersection beneath a massive concrete overpass, where the character crosses wet asphalt amidst falling rain and distant holograms. Finally, the path leads through a security checkpoint marked by bright yellow pillars and keep out signs, moving deeper into the industrial undercity.
